translation.literal_translation: Because of reference to sacraments, and because their absence is expressly stated. (36)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.36: saṃskāra references plus explicit absence-statements ground anadhikara conclusion.
translation.interpretive_note: Compact sutra summary of the saṃskāra criterion.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit social-category and adhikara terminology choices in records 1.3.089-1.3.096.
